Let's review the major developments and look ahead to 2026."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold mb-4 mt-6","children":"2025: The Year of Agents"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"className":"text-xl font-semibold mb-3 mt-5","children":"1. Agentic Workflows Went Mainstream"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"After years of research, autonomous AI agents finally became production-ready:"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"className":"list-disc pl-6 mb-4","children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Coding agents"}],": Cursor, Claude Code, and GitHub Copilot moved from autocomplete to full-featured development partners"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Research agents"}],": Systems that could autonomously search, synthesize, and report on complex topics"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Enterprise automation"}],": Multi-agent systems handling customer service, HR, and operations"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"className":"text-xl font-semibold mb-3 mt-5","children":"2. Reasoning Models Emerged"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"OpenAI's o1 and competitors introduced models that \"think\" before responding:"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"className":"list-disc pl-6 mb-4","children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":"Chain-of-thought reasoning became standard"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":"Test-time compute scaling showed promise"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":"Math and coding benchmarks saw dramatic improvements"}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"className":"text-xl font-semibold mb-3 mt-5","children":"3. Open Source Caught Up"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"Llama 3.1 and DeepSeek challenged closed-source dominance:"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"className":"list-disc pl-6 mb-4","children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":"405B parameter models rivaling GPT-4"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":"Fully open weights enabling self-hosting"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":"Community fine-tunes exceeding base model performance"}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold mb-4 mt-6","children":"What I Got Wrong"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"className":"list-disc pl-6 mb-4","children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Multimodal dominance"}],": I expected image/video generation to be more transformative. Progress was steady but not revolutionary."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Robotics"}],": The crossover from simulation to real-world deployment was slower than anticipated."]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold mb-4 mt-6","children":"2026 Predictions"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"className":"text-xl font-semibold mb-3 mt-5","children":"1. The Great Consolidation"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"Dozens of AI startups will fail or be acquired. The infrastructure layer (compute, models) is consolidating around a few players. The application layer winners are emerging."}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"className":"text-xl font-semibold mb-3 mt-5","children":"2. Regulatory Clarity (Finally)"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"The EU AI Act implementation will force standardization. US regulation will follow, focusing on:"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"className":"list-disc pl-6 mb-4","children":["\n","$L10","\n","$L11","\n","$L12","\n"]}],"\n","$L13","\n","$L14","\n","$L15","\n","$L16","\n","$L17","\n","$L18","\n","$L19","\n","$L1a","\n","$L1b","\n","$L1c","\n","$L1d"]]}]
10:["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":"Transparency requirements for training data"}]
11:["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":"Mandatory safety evaluations for frontier models"}]
12:["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":"Liability frameworks for AI-caused harms"}]

18:["$","h3",null,{"className":"text-xl font-semibold mb-3 mt-5","children":"5. The Agent Economy"}]
19:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"We'll see the first $1B+ companies with zero employees — fully automated businesses run by agent swarms handling everything from engineering to sales to support."}]
